title: thelypteris squamipes
intro: Thelypteris squamipes, also known as the scaly shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris squamipes include the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk remedies, often in combination with other herbs.
